boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on batch ID
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match on batch, assay, criterion, date
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Closure must match batch/assay/criterion/date before release

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. The deviation closure document (CLOSE-XOR-078) explicitly covers batch X-79, not the target batch X-78. The policy (STD-XOR-078-P) mandates an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and date. Since this condition is not met, the source boundary remains open, and the release is escalated.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch X-78 vs X-79
Closure batch X-79 does not match release batch X-78
